summary: Classified the five hydrated open PRs independently from the live inventory shard. No shared canonical is invented, no security-sensitive signal was present, and no close/merge/fix action is planned because low-signal and instant closeout are disabled, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, and each PR has either useful work, maintainer ownership, author follow-up, or review/proof gates that should remain with maintainers/authors.

actions.reason: Useful related docs PR with unresolved review changes; keep open for maintainer/author handling.
Maintainer-owned draft with active author/waiting state and review changes; keep open outside this inventory cleanup.
Substantive feature PR with review and proof blockers; not low-signal, duplicate, or safely closable.
Useful related Discord delivery fix with proof and maintainer-review gate; keep open for normal review.
Focused PR with active author follow-up and failing proof gate; keep open for proof/maintainer review.
